Unit tests via turbo (runs 'bun test --timeout 30000' in packages)

tests_added.implementation: def test_repo_typecheck() runs 'bun turbo typecheck' with 120s timeout

notes: Docker build fails due to missing 'unzip' package required by bun installer
Per instructions, did NOT modify Dockerfile - validate agent should fix this
Added 2 new pass_to_pass tests based on repo's actual CI pipeline:
1. test_repo_typecheck - runs bun turbo typecheck (CI gate from .github/workflows/typecheck.yml)
2. test_repo_opencode_package_tests - runs bun test for opencode package (from .github/workflows/test.yml)
These p2p tests ensure candidate solutions don't break existing repo CI checks
